'''fahugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osajin|osajin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osajin|osajin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fahugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæhigith|fæhigith]] || [[word:fæhigij|fæhigij]] || [[word:fæhigish|fæhigish]] || [[word:fæhigi|fæhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fahuhuguth|fahuhuguth]] || [[word:fahuhuguj|fahuhuguj]] || [[word:fahuhugush|fahuhugush]] || [[word:fahuhugu|fahuhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fahuguth|fahuguth]] || [[word:fahuguj|fahuguj]] || [[word:fahugush|fahugush]] || [[word:fahugu|fahugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fahufgufth|fahufgufth]] || [[word:fahufgufj|fahufgufj]] || [[word:fahufgufsh|fahufgufsh]] || [[word:fahufguf|fahufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fahuguthu|fahuguthu]] || [[word:fahuguju|fahuguju]] || [[word:fahugushu|fahugushu]] || [[word:fahuguku|fahuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fahuguth|fahuguth]] || [[word:fahuguj|fahuguj]] || [[word:fahugush|fahugush]] || [[word:fahugu|fahugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fahuguthul|fahuguthul]] || [[word:fahugujul|fahugujul]] || [[word:fahugushul|fahugushul]] || [[word:fahugukul|fahugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fahuguuthuthu|fahuguuthuthu]] || [[word:fahuguujuju|fahuguujuju]] || [[word:fahuguushushu|fahuguushushu]] || [[word:fahuguuku|fahuguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fahuguthun|fahuguthun]] || [[word:fahugujun|fahugujun]] || [[word:fahugushun|fahugushun]] || [[word:fahugukun|fahugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fahuguthuoro|fahuguthuoro]] || [[word:fahugujuoro|fahugujuoro]] || [[word:fahugushuoro|fahugushuoro]] || [[word:fahugukuoro|fahugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b470777}}
